name: optimize-backend
description: Backend server for Optimize — operational dashboard for Egyptian clothing brands

scripts.setup: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');fs.mkdirSync('public',{recursive:true});const src=p.resolve(__dirname,'../Web/etrnll-dashboard.html');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,'public/index.html');console.log('[setup] copied dashboard → public/index.html');}else{console.log('[setup] Web/etrnll-dashboard.html not found — place your dashboard HTML at public/index.html manually');}"
scripts.prestart: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const src=p.resolve(__dirname,'../Web/etrnll-dashboard.html');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,'public/index.html');console.log('[prestart] synced dashboard → public/index.html');}else{console.log('[prestart] Web/ not found, using existing public/index.html');}"
